Tab 1.course: B.Tech. Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
Tab 1.overview: Artificial Intelligence and Data Science (AI DS) Our 4-year B.Tech program in AI and DS equips students to design intelligent systems, develop ethical and responsible AI solutions, and transform industries. The program emphasizes coding, problem-solving, and real-world applications, preparing students for thriving careers in technology, research, and entrepreneurship. This artificial intelligence course in Pune provides hands-on learning and industry exposure, making it ideal for students seeking practical experience. With a strong focus on practical learning and guaranteed internships, we ensure our students gain industry-relevant experience alongside theoretical knowledge.
Tab 1.eligibility:
• Passed 10+2 examination with Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry. Obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in each of the above subjects.
  • Passed Minimum THREE years / TWO years (Lateral Entry) Diploma examination with at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in ANY branch of Engineering and Technology.

Tab 2.course: B.Tech. Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning)
Tab 2.overview:
Artificial Intelligence will be part of our future, it’s inevitable.
The department of AI & ML focuses on cutting-edge technologies such as Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML). Our department offers comprehensive courses to empower students with knowledge and skills in AI and ML. We emphasize ethics, privacy, and responsible AI practices to ensure the development of socially beneficial AI solutions. Graduates from our department are well-prepared to excel in industry, academia, and entrepreneurship, making a positive impact in the world of AI and ML.
The B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning offered by ALARD University with an intake of 120 seats, is one of the leading artificial intelligence courses in Pune. B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning is a 4 year undergraduate degree program in the engineering stream. In this course, students are taught how to write the code of the said machine. This code works as a guiding instruction for machines so that machines can perform tasks with less human interaction. The UG program’s objective is to create exceptionally well AI and ML engineers who will transform the world through creative AI and ML solutions.
Tab 2.eligibility:
• Passed 10+2 examination with Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry. Obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in each of the above subjects.
  • Passed Minimum THREE years / TWO years (Lateral Entry) Diploma examination with at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in ANY branch of Engineering and Technology.

Tab 4.overview: The B Tech in Computer Science and Engineering program offered by Alard University, one of the top BTech college in Pune, is one of the best four-year full-time courses for quality education and overall growth of the students. The program emphasises on applying mathematics and principles of computing to solve engineering problems. CSE graduates cater to the needs of most industries, including software, healthcare, communications, manufacturing, automobile to name a few. This program has been designed taking into consideration the views of various academicians and industry experts.
Tab 4.eligibility:
• Passed 10+2 examination with Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry. Obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in each of the above subjects.
  • Passed Minimum THREE years / TWO years (Lateral Entry) Diploma examination with at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in ANY branch of Engineering and Technology.

Tab 5.course: B.Tech. Computer Science Engineering (Cyber Security and Forensics)
Tab 5.overview: The B Tech in Computer Science and Engineering program offered by Alard University, one of the top BTech college in Pune, is one of the best four-year full-time courses for quality education and overall growth of the students. The program emphasises on applying mathematics and principles of computing to solve engineering problems. CSE graduates cater to the needs of most industries, including software, healthcare, communications, manufacturing, automobile to name a few. This program has been designed taking into consideration the views of various academicians and industry experts.
Tab 5.eligibility:
• Passed 10+2 examination with Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry. Obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in each of the above subjects.
  • Passed Minimum THREE years / TWO years (Lateral Entry) Diploma examination with at least 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in ANY branch of Engineering and Technology.

Tab 7.overview: The B.Pharm program is a four-year undergraduate course that offers an in-depth understanding of pharmaceutical science and technology. The curriculum covers a wide range of subjects such as pharmaceutical chemistry, pharmacognosy, pharmacology, and pharmaceutical analysis. Students also gain hands-on experience through practical sessions, internships, and industrial visits, ensuring they are well-prepared for careers in pharmacy practice, research, or industry.
Tab 7.eligibility:
• Candidates must have graduation with at least 45% aggregate marks (for Open category) and 40% aggregate marks (for Reserved category) with Physics, chemistry, Biology and/or Maths.
  • Candidate must have positive score in any of NEET/MHT-CET/ AUSET Entrance Test.

Tab 8.overview: The B.A. LL.B. is a five-year integrated undergraduate degree program in law, offered by ALARD School of Law. The course combines the study of arts subjects like history, economics, and politics with law subjects like contracts, torts, and constitutional law.
Tab 8.eligibility:
• Qualifying Examination: 10+2 (Higher Secondary) examination in any stream Minimum Marks: 10+2 (Higher Secondary) pass with minimum 50% marks For OPEN. 10+2 (Higher Secondary) pass with minimum 45% marks For any CAST
  • Entrance Examination: Common Law Admission Test (CLAT) ALARD Entrance Exam

Tab 9.overview: The 3-year LL.B. (Bachelor of Laws) program is a postgraduate degree in law, offered by various law schools and universities in India. The program aims to equip students with a comprehensive understanding of the legal system, as well as critical thinking, research, and analytical skills. Upon completion, graduates are eligible to practice law in India and pursue careers in judiciary, advocacy, corporate law, and more.
Tab 9.eligibility:
Qualifying Examination:
  • Graduation (3-year or 4-year degree)
Minimum Marks:
  • 45% aggregate for Open Category
  • 40% aggregate for Reserved Category
Entrance Exam:
  • ALARD Entrance & Scholarship Test (AUSET)

Tab 10.course: Bachelor of Science in Paramedical Technology (Medical Imaging Technology)
Tab 10.overview: Bachelor of Science in Paramedical Technology (Medical Imaging Technology) is an undergraduate-level program with a course duration of 4 years . During study, the student learns about medical imaging techniques and technologies and basic knowledge of human physiology, pathology, and human anatomy.

Tab 11.course: Bachelor of Science in Paramedical Technology (Medical Laboratory Technology)
Tab 11.overview: A Bachelor of Science in Paramedical Technology (Medical Laboratory Technology) (MLT) is a 4 year undergraduate program that trains students in diagnostic testing, laboratory procedures, and medical research. The course covers clinical biochemistry, microbiology, hematology, pathology, and blood banking, equipping students with skills to analyze body fluids, detect diseases, and assist in medical diagnostics.

Tab 12.course: Bachelor of Science in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology
Tab 12.overview: A B.Sc. in Biotechnology is an undergraduate degree program that blends Biology with technology to address problems related to health, agriculture, and the environment. The course involves use of biological organisms, systems, or processes to develop new products, services, and solutions

Tab 13.overview: The BBA program equips students with the skills and knowledge of leadership, entrepreneurship, strategic thinking, research, communication, and ethical conduct, which are essential for success in the business world. Students are exposed to the functioning of the corporate world through industry visits, summer internships, and live projects. The lectures are conducted by industry leaders as well as academic faculty, while guest lectures and seminars provide further learning opportunities. The program also provides strong placement training and support from the career services department, along with training for higher studies through various seminars on career opportunities after graduation.
Tab 13.eligibility:
• Student should have scored a minimum of 45% at 10+2 level from ICSE, CBSE, Any State Board Examination, or equivalent examination from any recognized board in Arts, Science, Commerce, or any other stream (at least 40% for reserved category candidates).
  • Candidates are selected on the basis of Merit AND Personal Interview conducted by AUP.
Tab 13.specialization:
• Human Resource Management (HRM)
  • Finance (FIN)
  • Marketing Management (MKT)
  • Logistics & Supply Chain Management (LS)

Tab 14.overview: Bachelor of Computer Applications is a 4 year course aligned with National Education Policy (NEP) guidelines, with provision for Integrated MCA program, covers essential topics in computer fundamentals, programming, operating systems, mathematics, ethics, and various specialized areas. BCA program equips the students with essential skills and knowledge required and the rapidly evolving IT industry. BCA curriculum covers a wide range of core and elective subjects providing insights into their significance and how they contribute to students’ overall development. These subjects not only focus on theoretical concepts but also emphasize practical applications to tackle real-world challenges.
Tab 14.eligibility:
• Student should have scored a minimum of 45% at 10+2 level from ICSE, CBSE, Any State Board Examination, or equivalent qualification from any recognized board in Science or Commerce, preferably with Mathematics as a subject (at least 40% for reserved category candidates).
  • Candidates are selected on the basis of Merit AND Personal Interview conducted by AUP.

Tab 1.overview: Our M.Pharm program is a two year postgraduate course designed for students who wish to specialize in specific areas of Pharmaceutics and Quality Assurance Techniques. The curriculum is research-oriented, encouraging innovation and advanced study. The program emphasizes both academic and practical learning, enabling students to contribute to the development of new drugs, therapies, and healthcare solutions.
Tab 1.eligibility:
• Candidates must have B. Pharm with minimum 55 % marks aggregate marks (for Open category) and 50% aggregate marks (for Reserved category) from PCI approved Institute.
  • Should have obtained PCI Registration or should obtain the same within 1 month from date of admission.
  • Candidate must have positive score in any of this GPAT/ AUSET Entrance Test.

Tab 2.overview: Our M.Pharm program is a two year postgraduate course designed for students who wish to specialize in specific areas of Pharmaceutics and Quality Assurance Techniques. The curriculum is research-oriented, encouraging innovation and advanced study. The program emphasizes both academic and practical learning, enabling students to contribute to the development of new drugs, therapies, and healthcare solutions.
Tab 2.eligibility:
• Candidates must have B. Pharm with minimum 55 % marks aggregate marks (for Open category) and 50% aggregate marks (for Reserved category) from PCI approved Institute.
  • Should have obtained PCI Registration or should obtain the same within 1 month from date of admission.
  • Candidate must have positive score in any of this GPAT/ AUSET Entrance Test.

Tab 3.overview: Master of Science (Medical Imaging Technology) is specifically aimed at those pursuing a professional career in Imaging Science technology . It is designed to provide specialized training in the scientific principles of modern imaging science and in the application of these principles in the field of radio diagnosis . It is designed as higher degree course suitable for graduates having experience in the technology of imaging science.
Tab 3.eligibility:
• Candidates must have graduation with at least 45% aggregate marks (for Open category) and 40% aggregate marks (for Reserved category) in commerce or science streams.
  • Candidate must have positive score in any of this All India Level Entrance Test/ State Level Entrance Test/National Level Entrance Test/ AUSET Entrance Test.

Tab 6.overview:
The Master of Business Administration (MBA) program is specially designed keeping in mind the current and future needs of the industry. It prepares young, energetic and curious minds to handle the complexities in the ‘technology led’ future. The School of Business Management at ALARD University, often recognized among the top MBA colleges in Pune, is an enabler that catapults people into higher orbits and makes their dreams come true.
This is two-year long, full-time program and is fully residential. Students will have to stay in the university hostels for the entire duration. The unique specializations offered during the second year prepare you to meet the emerging needs to the industry. Experienced faculty drawn from various disciplines and geographies will train you in the program. The School of Business incorporates lectures, tutorials, seminars, presentations, intensive workshops, and fieldwork as part of its teaching methods. Students benefit from a flexible credit system that allows them to take advantage of diverse educational offerings and pursue their own academic interests.
Tab 6.eligibility:
• Open Category student should have scored a minimum of 50% aggregate in Graduation in any stream from UGC approved Institution or equivalent (at least 45% marks, in case of reserved category candidate). Positive score in the following National Level Tests conducted by an apex testing body: CAT, MAT, XAT, PERA, MH-CET, CUET & CMAT or AUP Test will be accepted.
  • Candidates are selected on the basis of Group Discussion AND Personal Interview conducted by the AUP.
Tab 6.specialization:
• Marketing Management (MKT)
  • International Business (IB)
  • Banking Financial Services and Insurance(BFSI)
  • FinTech(FT)
  • Finance(FIN)
  • Human Resource Management(HRM)
  • Pharmaceutical Management
  • Agri Business Management

Tab 7.overview: The MCA program at ASBM is designed to produce industry-ready professionals who are proficient in multiple programming languages, modern computing technologies, and tools for data analytics and artificial intelligence. The program focuses on both the theoretical and practical aspects of IT, ensuring a well-rounded education.
Tab 7.eligibility:
• Open Category student should have scored a minimum of 50% in any graduation degree (e.g.: B.E. / B.Tech./ B.Sc / B.Com. / B. Voc./ BCA etc.,) with Mathematics at 10+2 levels (at least 45% marks, in case of reserved category candidates).
  • Positive score in the All India/State level entrance test or National Level entrance/Entrance test conducted by AUP will be accepted.
  • Candidates are selected on the basis of merit AND Personal Interview conducted by AUP.

Tab 1.overview: This foundational program is designed for students who wish to start their careers in the pharmacy sector. It provides essential knowledge and skills in pharmaceutical sciences, including pharmacology, pharmaceutics, pharmacognosy, social pharmacy and medicinal chemistry. The D.Pharm curriculum equips students with the competencies required to work as pharmacy technicians in hospitals/ health centers, chemists in retail stores or continue their education in higher pharmacy programs.
Tab 1.eligibility:
• Candidates must have passed 10+2 with at least 45% aggregate marks (for Open category) and 40% aggregate marks (for Reserved category) with subjects Physics, chemistry, Biology or Maths.
  • Candidate must have positive score in any of this All India Level Entrance Test/ State Level Entrance Test/National Level Entrance Test/ AUSET Entrance Test.
